interface.name: zsingularity_preview_manager_v1
interface.description: This interface allows a client to capture the contents of a toplevel window.

request.name: capture_toplevel
request.description: Create a capture session for the given toplevel window.

request.name: destroy
request.description: All objects created by the manager will remain valid.

interface.name: zsingularity_preview_frame_v1
interface.description: This object represents a single capture of a window.

event.name: buffer
event.description: Provides information about the buffer format and dimensions. This event is sent before the ready event.

request.name: copy

description.summary: copy the frame to a buffer

request.description: Copy the captured frame to the provided buffer. The buffer must be valid and have the correct dimensions and format.

event.name: flags
event.description: Provides flags about the capture (e.g. y-invert).

event.name: ready
event.description: Called when the copy is complete.

event.name: failed
event.description: Called if the capture fails (e.g. window destroyed).
